title: Set new password
subtitle: Enter your new password below.

form.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the token from the email (or it may be pre-filled from the link)

successMessage: Your password has been changed. You can now log in.

errors.tokenRequired: Reset token is missing. Use the link from the email.
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.resetFailed: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.

linkExpiredMessage: This reset link has already been used or has expired. Request a new one to set a new password.
